content.en:
**Disloyal Minister** (不臣之君) is a 2026 Sanguosha expansion that revolutionizes identity-based gameplay. Not a hero expansion — it introduces **7 new identity modes** that fundamentally change faction dynamics. 4-8 players.

### The 7 Modes

| # | Mode | Players | Difficulty | Core Twist |
|---|------|---------|------------|------------|
| 1 | **暴虐无道** (Tyranny) | 5 | ☆☆☆ | Tyrant kills all; Interceptor can steal win |
| 2 | **大忠似奸** (False Loyalty) | 7 | ☆☆ | Rebels ID each other at start; mixing loyalties |
| 3 | **失心疯** (Madness) | 7 | ☆☆☆ | Some players don't know their own identity |
| 4 | **各怀鬼胎** (Hidden Agendas) | 5 | ☆☆☆☆ | Three different "traitor" types with competing goals |
| 5 | **合纵斗地主** (Coalition) | 4 | ☆☆☆☆ | 2v2 with landlord system; peasants can revolt |
| 6 | **无间道** (Infernal Affairs) | 8 | ☆☆☆☆☆ | 4v4 spy: each team has a mole from the enemy |
| 7 | **锋矢奇谋** (Arrow Formation) | 8 | — | 4v4: kill enemy General; bait & vanguard mechanics |

**Requires the base game.** Exclusive heroes: Liu Hong (刘宏), Dong Zhuo (董卓), Zhang Jiao (张角).
content.zh:
**《不臣之君》** 是2026年推出的三国杀身份玩法扩展，不是武将扩充，而是引入**7种全新身份模式**，从根本上改变阵营对抗。4-8人。

### 7种模式总览

| # | 模式 | 人数 | 难度 | 核心特色 |
|---|------|------|------|----------|
| 1 | **暴虐无道** | 5 | ☆☆☆ | 暴君杀光所有人；间者可截胡胜利 |
| 2 | **大忠似奸** | 7 | ☆☆ | 义军开局互认；忠臣如内奸 |
| 3 | **失心疯** | 7 | ☆☆☆ | 有角色不知道自己的真实身份 |
| 4 | **各怀鬼胎** | 5 | ☆☆☆☆ | 三种"贼"各有不同胜利条件 |
| 5 | **合纵斗地主** | 4 | ☆☆☆☆ | 2v2+地主奴役机制，农民可起义 |
| 6 | **无间道** | 8 | ☆☆☆☆☆ | 4v4谍战：每方各有一名敌方内鬼 |
| 7 | **锋矢奇谋** | 8 | — | 4v4：击杀大将；前锋诱饵机制 |

**需要标准版。** 专属武将：刘宏、董卓、张角。

content.en:
### Setup (5 players)

| Role | Count |
|---|---|
| **Tyrant (暴君)** | 1 |
| **Admonisher (诤臣)** | 1 |
| **Interceptor (间者)** | 1 |
| **Rebel (逆乱)** | 2 |

### Victory Conditions

| Role | To Win |
|---|---|
| **Tyrant** | All other characters dead |
| **Admonisher** | Rebels AND Tyrant dead (Rebels first, then Tyrant) |
| **Interceptor** | **On YOUR turn**, if another role meets their win condition — you win instead! |
| **Rebel** | Tyrant dies while at least one Rebel is alive |

### Key Mechanics
- Tyrant gets **+2 max health** (empty — no starting health gain).
- Tyrant recovers 1 health per kill.
- **Interceptor** is the wildcard: if Tyrant dies on Interceptor's turn → Interceptor steals the win.
- Rebels must time the Tyrant kill carefully to avoid handing victory to the Interceptor.
content.zh:
### 身份配置（5人）

| 身份 | 数量 |
|---|---|
| **暴君** | 1 |
| **诤臣** | 1 |
| **间者** | 1 |
| **逆乱** | 2 |

### 胜利条件

| 身份 | 条件 |
|---|---|
| **暴君** | 所有其他角色死亡 |
| **诤臣** | 逆乱和暴君死亡（需先死反再死主） |
| **间者** | **在你的回合内**，其他身份达成胜利条件则改为你单独获胜！ |
| **逆乱** | 暴君死亡，且此时有逆乱存活 |

### 核心机制
- 暴君**体力上限+2**（空上限不加血）。
- 暴君每杀一人回复1体力。
- **间者**是最大变数——暴君在间者回合内死亡→间者直接获胜。
- 逆乱推暴君时必须小心为间者做嫁衣。

content.en:
### Dong Zhuo (董卓) — 6 Health, Tyrant

- **Deceitful Cup (诈觥):** Play Phase start → force another character to choose: ① All hand cards treated as [Wine] this turn + take 1 dmg from you; ② Treat as using [Wine] on you + deal 1 dmg to you.

- **Fierce Slaughter (凶戮):** Spade hand cards = [Wine]. [Wine] has no use limit. [Wine]-enhanced [Slash] needs X [Dodge] cards (X = Wine stack count).

- **Collapse (崩坏):** Compulsory — End Phase: if not lowest health, lose 1 health or -1 max health.

- **Rampage (肆虐)** — Tyrant Skill: Compulsory — at the start of EACH ROUND, recover all health. Once per turn, when dealing damage: -1 max health and draw cards equal to damage dealt. If this kills a character, reset the "once per turn" limit.
content.zh:
### 董卓 — 6体力，暴君

- **诈觥：** 出牌阶段开始时，令一名其他角色选择：①本回合所有手牌视为【酒】并受你1点伤害；②视为对你用【酒】并造成1点伤害。

- **凶戮：** 黑桃手牌可当【酒】；【酒】无次数限制；【酒】【杀】需要X张【闪】抵消（X=酒强化次数）。

- **崩坏：** 锁定技，结束阶段若不为体力最小则失去1体力或减1上限。

- **肆虐（暴君技）：** 锁定技，**每轮开始时回复所有体力**。每回合限一次，造成伤害时减1点体力上限并摸等同伤害值的牌。若因此杀死角色，重置该限制。

content.en:
### Setup (7 players)

| Role | Count |
|---|---|
| **Foolish Monarch (昏君)** | 1 |
| **Treacherous Minister (奸臣)** | 1 |
| **Loyal Minister (忠臣)** | 2 |
| **Righteous Army (义军)** | 3 |

### Special Rules
- **Foolish Monarch reveals immediately.**
- **Righteous Army members open eyes and ID each other** at game start (like Werewolf).
- Monarch sits at **seat 1**, gets **+1 max health & health**.

### Victory Conditions

| Role | To Win |
|---|---|
| **Foolish Monarch** | All Loyal Ministers + All Righteous Army dead |
| **Treacherous Minister** | All Loyal Ministers dead AND Monarch alive |
| **Loyal Minister** | All Treacherous Ministers + Righteous Army dead, Monarch alive |
| **Righteous Army** | Monarch dead |

### Core Twist
> When the LAST Loyal Minister dies, if all Righteous Army are already dead → **Monarch AND Treacherous Minister win together!**

- Righteous Army can't blindly kill Loyal Ministers first (or TM steals win).
- Loyal Minister ≈ traditional Traitor role (keep Monarch alive but no need to be last).
- Treacherous Minister ≈ traditional Loyalist (doesn't care about Rebels).
content.zh:
### 身份配置（7人）

| 身份 | 数量 |
|---|---|
| **昏君** | 1 |
| **奸臣** | 1 |
| **忠臣** | 2 |
| **义军** | 3 |

### 特殊规则
- **昏君立即明置身份。**
- **义军开局睁眼互认**（类似狼人杀）。
- 昏君为**1号位**，体力上限与体力值**+1**。

### 胜利条件

| 身份 | 条件 |
|---|---|
| **昏君** | 所有忠臣+所有义军死亡 |
| **奸臣** | 所有忠臣死亡且昏君存活 |
| **忠臣** | 所有奸臣+义军死亡且昏君存活 |
| **义军** | 昏君死亡 |

### 核心博弈
> 当最后一名忠臣死亡时，若义军已全灭 → **昏君与奸臣同时获胜！**

- 义军不能无脑先推忠臣（否则奸臣捡漏）。
- 忠臣≈传统内奸（需保主但不必单挑）。
- 奸臣≈传统忠臣（不管反贼死活）。

title.en: Foolish Monarch Liu Hong (昏君刘宏)

content.en:
### Liu Hong (刘宏) — Foolish Monarch

- **Blinding the Eyes (障目)** — Monarch Skill: When a non-Righteous Army character dies, their identity is NOT revealed (only viewable by other characters). When killing ANY character, treat it as "killed Righteous Army" → **draw 2 cards**.

### Strategic Impact
- Identity concealment on kills creates huge information asymmetry.
- The Monarch is incentivized to kill everyone (each kill = draw 2).
- Other players can't verify who died — was that a Loyal Minister or Treacherous Minister?
content.zh:
### 刘宏 — 昏君

- **障目（昏君技）：** 非义军角色死亡时身份不亮出（仅其他角色可观看）。杀死**任意角色**均按"杀死义军"处理 → **摸两张牌**。

### 战略影响
- 死亡身份不公开制造巨大信息不对称。
- 昏君杀人即摸牌，人人皆可杀。
- 其他玩家无法验证死者身份——死的是忠臣还是奸臣？

content.en:
### Setup (7 players)

| Role | Count |
|---|---|
| **Cult Leader (教主)** | 1 |
| **Guardian (护法)** | 2 |
| **Soldier (官兵)** | 3 |
| **Traitor (内奸)** | 1 |
| **Madman (失心)** | 1 |

### Core Mechanic: Hidden Self

- **1-2 non-Monarch characters DON'T KNOW their own identity** (identity card is hidden from them).
- Only the **Cult Leader** knows who the Madmen are.

### Kill Rewards & Penalties
- Kill a Madman → **-1 max health** (deters hunting Madmen)
- Cult Leader kills Guardian → **discard all cards**
- Kill a Soldier → **draw 3 cards**

### Strategy
- Madmen must deduce their role by observing others' behavior.
- Cult Leader can exploit information gap to manipulate Madmen.
- The -1 max health penalty protects Madmen from being randomly killed.
content.zh:
### 身份配置（7人）

| 身份 | 数量 |
|---|---|
| **教主** | 1 |
| **护法** | 2 |
| **官兵** | 3 |
| **内奸** | 1 |
| **失心** | 1 |

### 核心机制：身份未知

- **1-2名非教主角色不知道自己的真实身份**（身份牌对其不可见）。
- 只有**教主**知道谁是失心者。

### 击杀奖惩
- 杀死失心 → **减1点体力上限**（威慑保护失心）
- 教主杀死护法 → **弃置所有牌**
- 杀死官兵 → **摸三张牌**

### 策略要点
- 失心需要通过观察他人行为推测自己身份。
- 教主利用信息差迷惑失心为己所用。
- 减上限惩罚有效保护失心不被随意盲杀。

title.en: Cult Leader Zhang Jiao (教主张角)

content.en:
### Zhang Jiao (张角) — 3 Health, Cult Leader

- **Shrouding the Masses (蔽众)** — Cult Leader Skill: Killing a Madman has NO penalty. At game start: choose a non-Madman character → view their identity and MAKE them a Madman. Then you may freely swap identity cards among all Madmen.

- **Lightning Strike (雷击) / Dark Arts (鬼道):** Similar to standard OL Zhang Jiao abilities.

### Strategic Impact
- The Cult Leader can secretly reassign identities — creating absolute chaos.
- Madmen who think they're one role may actually be another.
- The Cult Leader builds their own hidden army.
content.zh:
### 张角 — 3体力，教主

- **蔽众（教主技）：** 杀死失心不受惩罚。游戏开始时，可选择一名非失心角色观看其身份并**令其成为失心**，然后可任意交换所有失心角色的身份牌。

- **雷击/鬼道：** 基本沿袭OL界张角技能。

### 战略影响
- 教主可秘密重新分配身份——制造绝对混乱。
- 失心以为自己是什么身份，实际可能是另一个身份。
- 教主暗中打造自己的隐藏军队。

content.en:
### Setup (5 players)

| Role | Count |
|---|---|
| **Monarch (主公)** | 1 |
| **Loyalist (忠臣)** | 1 |
| **Treacherous Traitor (奸贼)** | 1 |
| **Evil Traitor (恶贼)** | 1 |
| **Rebel Traitor (逆贼)** | 1 |

### Victory Conditions — The Core Puzzle

| Role | To Win |
|---|---|
| **Monarch** | All three Traitor types dead |
| **Loyalist** | Same as Monarch (protect Monarch, eliminate 3 traitors) |
| **Treacherous Traitor (奸贼)** | Monarch dies while **NO Loyalist is alive** |
| **Evil Traitor (恶贼)** | Monarch dies while **a Loyalist IS alive**; OR all other characters dead |
| **Rebel Traitor (逆贼)** | Monarch dies while Treacherous+Evil Traitors are **BOTH alive OR BOTH dead** |

### Core Dynamic
> Three Traitors with mutually contradictory conditions — it's possible for a Traitor to **protect the Monarch** to prevent another Traitor from winning!

- Evil Traitor must keep Loyalist alive → becomes Monarch's bodyguard.
- Rebel Traitor needs both peers in sync → monitors who kills whom.
- Treacherous Traitor wants Loyalist dead first → hunts the Loyalist.

### Rewards
- Monarch kills Loyalist → discard all cards.
- Kill any Traitor → draw **3 cards**.
content.zh:
### 身份配置（5人）

| 身份 | 数量 |
|---|---|
| **主公** | 1 |
| **忠臣** | 1 |
| **奸贼** | 1 |
| **恶贼** | 1 |
| **逆贼** | 1 |

### 胜利条件——核心博弈

| 身份 | 条件 |
|---|---|
| **主公** | 三种贼全部死亡 |
| **忠臣** | 与主公一致（保护主公，消灭三贼） |
| **奸贼** | **在没有忠臣存活的情况下**→主公死亡 |
| **恶贼** | **在有忠臣存活的情况下**→主公死亡；**或**所有其他角色死亡 |
| **逆贼** | 奸贼、恶贼**均存活**或**均死亡**的情况下→主公死亡 |

### 核心动态
> 三贼条件相互矛盾——贼可能**保主公**以防止另一贼获胜！

- 恶贼必须留忠臣活口→变相保皇党。
- 逆贼需要两个同伙同时活或同时死→监控全局。
- 奸贼要忠臣先死→追杀忠臣。

### 奖惩
- 主公杀死忠臣→弃所有牌。
- 杀死任意贼→摸**三张牌**。

content.en:
### Setup (4 players)

| Role | Count |
|---|---|
| **Dragon Landlord (龙地主)** | 1 |
| **Dragon Peasant (龙农民)** | 1 |
| **Tiger Landlord (虎地主)** | 1 |
| **Tiger Peasant (虎农民)** | 1 |

### Two Phases

| Phase | Structure |
|---|---|
| **Before Revolt** | 2v2: Dragon team vs Tiger team |
| **After Revolt** | 1v1v2: Dragon Lord vs Tiger Lord vs Both Peasants |

### Revolt Mechanic
- Landlords gain **Enslavement (奴役)** marks (1 per use or per round end).
- When marks reach **9** → **REVOLT triggers!**

### Skills
- **Enslavement (奴役)** — Landlord Skill: Once per Play Phase, deal 1 dmg to your own Peasant → **draw 3 cards**.
- **Uprising (啸聚)** — Peasant Skill (after revolt): Damage dealt to your original Landlord is **+1**.

### Victory
| Phase | Goal |
|---|---|
| Before Revolt | Enemy Landlord dies |
| After Revolt | All characters in the other 2 factions die (3-way battle) |

### Core Dilemma
Landlords want to use Enslavement for card advantage — but each use brings revolt closer. If one Landlord uses it, the other feels pressured to follow. **An arms race where everyone loses.**
content.zh:
### 身份配置（4人）

| 身份 | 数量 |
|---|---|
| **龙地主** | 1 |
| **龙农民** | 1 |
| **虎地主** | 1 |
| **虎农民** | 1 |

### 两个阶段

| 阶段 | 阵营结构 |
|---|---|
| **起义前** | 2v2：龙队 vs 虎队 |
| **起义后** | 1v1v2：龙地主 vs 虎地主 vs 双方农民 |

### 起义机制
- 地主获得**奴役**标记（每次发动或每轮结束+1）。
- 标记达**9枚**→**起义触发！**

### 技能
- **奴役** — 地主技：出牌阶段限一次，对己方农民造成1点伤害→**摸三张牌**。
- **啸聚** — 农民技（起义后获得）：对原阵营地主造成的伤害**+1**。

### 胜利条件
| 阶段 | 目标 |
|---|---|
| 起义前 | 敌方地主死亡 |
| 起义后 | 另外两个阵营全部死亡（三方混战） |

### 核心博弈
地主想靠奴役赚牌差——但每次发动都加速起义。一方发动后，另一方很难忍住不跟。**军备竞赛，最终同归于尽。**

content.en:
### Setup (8 players — 4v4)

Each team (Red/Blue or Dragon/Tiger):

| Role | Count | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| **Commander (主帅)** | 1 | Identity revealed. Can view ALL enemy identities. |
| **Guard (护卫)** | 2 | Regular role. Don't know who the mole is. |
| **Mole (内鬼)** | 1 | Card back = enemy color. Actually belongs to your team. |

### Special Rules
1. Identity cards have **colored backs** to distinguish teams.
2. Both **Commanders reveal immediately**.
3. Each Commander views **all enemy team members' identities** (knowing their mole).
4. Moles do NOT know that the Commander knows they're the mole.

### Kill Rules
- Kill a character with the **SAME actual team as you** → **discard all cards**.
- **Commander is killed** → that team's **Mole immediately reveals identity**.

### Victory: Kill the ENEMY TEAM'S MOLE

### The Ultimate Irony
> Commander knows the enemy mole's identity but can't openly act on it (would expose the mole). Guards blindly attack — and might accidentally kill their own mole.

**The nightmare scenario:** A Guard snipes what they think is an enemy… and it's their own mole, losing the game instantly.
content.zh:
### 身份配置（8人 — 4v4）

每方阵营各含：

| 角色 | 数量 | 说明 |
|---|---|---|
| **主帅** | 1 | 明置身份。可查看敌方全员身份牌。 |
| **护卫** | 2 | 普通角色。不知道谁是内鬼。 |
| **内鬼** | 1 | 牌背为对方阵营。正面归属敌方，实为自己人。 |

### 特殊规则
1. 身份牌以**牌背颜色**区分阵营。
2. 双方**主帅立即明置**。
3. 每位主帅查看**对方阵营所有角色**的身份（知道自己安插的内鬼是谁）。
4. 内鬼不知道主帅已知其身份。

### 击杀规则
- 击杀与自己**实际阵营相同**的角色→**弃置所有牌**。
- **主帅被击杀**→该阵营**内鬼立即明置身份**。

### 胜利：击杀敌方内鬼

### 终极讽刺
> 主帅知道敌方内鬼身份，但不能明着打（会暴露内鬼）。护卫盲打——可能把自己内鬼狙死。

**噩梦场景：** 护卫以为是敌人开了一枪……结果打死的是自家内鬼，直接输掉游戏。

content.en:
### Setup (8 players — 4v4)

Each team (4 players):

| Role | Notes |
|---|---|
| **General (大将)** | Hidden at start. Reveals when Vanguard dies. |
| **Center Army (中军)** | Standard role. |
| **Vanguard (前锋)** | **Revealed at start.** +1 max health & health. |
| **Bait (诱饵)** | If killed by enemy → own General discards all cards AND is exposed. |

### Core Mechanics
- **Objective:** Kill the enemy **General**.
- Vanguard dies → own General identity revealed.
- Bait dies → enemy General identity revealed + discards all cards.

### Selection Order
1. Both Generals view their own Center Army, Vanguard, and Bait.
2. Both Vanguards reveal simultaneously.
3. Both Generals pick & reveal simultaneously.
4. Vanguards pick openly → all others pick simultaneously.

### Privileges
- Vanguard: revealed, +1 max health, +1 card draw.
- General: +1 max health.

### Strategic Depth
> Sacrifice your Vanguard to expose the enemy General. Kill the Bait to blow up the enemy General's hand. A game of calculated sacrifice and target priority.
content.zh:
### 身份配置（8人 — 4v4）

每方4人：

| 角色 | 说明 |
|---|---|
| **大将** | 初始隐藏。前锋死后才亮明。 |
| **中军** | 标准角色。 |
| **前锋** | **开局明置。** 体力上限+1、体力值+1。 |
| **诱饵** | 被敌方击杀→己方大将弃置所有牌并暴露身份。 |

### 核心机制
- **目标：** 击杀对方**大将**。
- 前锋阵亡→己方大将身份亮明。
- 诱饵阵亡→敌方大将身份暴露+弃置所有牌。

### 选将流程
1. 双方大将各自查看己方中军、前锋、诱饵。
2. 双方前锋同时明置。
3. 双方大将同时选将亮将。
4. 前锋明牌选将→其他角色同时选将。

### 特权
- 前锋：明置+上限+1+多摸1牌。
- 大将：体力上限+1。

### 战略深度
> 牺牲前锋暴露对方大将，击杀诱饵引爆对方大将手牌。一场精心计算的牺牲与目标优先级博弈。

content.en:
### The Three Exclusive Heroes

| Hero | Mode | Health | Role |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Dong Zhuo (董卓)** | 暴虐无道 | 6 | Tyrant (暴君) |
| **Liu Hong (刘宏)** | 大忠似奸 | — | Foolish Monarch (昏君) |
| **Zhang Jiao (张角)** | 失心疯 | 3 | Cult Leader (教主) |

### Universal Rule: Ruler Skill Compatibility

> In ANY mode, if your identity is a **Ruler-type role** (Monarch, Tyrant, Foolish Monarch, Cult Leader, Commander, Landlord), your character's **Monarch Skill (主公技) takes effect**.

This makes characters with Monarch Skills viable across all 7 modes.
content.zh:
### 三位专属武将

| 武将 | 模式 | 体力 | 身份 |
|---|---|---|---|
| **董卓** | 暴虐无道 | 6 | 暴君 |
| **刘宏** | 大忠似奸 | — | 昏君 |
| **张角** | 失心疯 | 3 | 教主 |

### 通用规则：主公技普适化

> 任何模式下，如果你的身份是**君主类角色**（主公、暴君、昏君、教主、主帅、地主），武将牌上的**主公技皆会生效**。

这使得拥有主公技的武将在全部7种模式中都能发挥作用。
